---
title: "get_company_name"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_company_name()`

Get Company Name from ID

## Usage

```r
get_company_name(company_id, token = "FLIX_PATROL")
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `company_id` | Character. The FlixPatrol ID (e.g., "cmp_IA6TdMqwf6kuyQvxo9bJ4nKX"). |
| `token` | Character. The name of the environment variable containing the API key. |

## Value

A character string containing the company name.

## Description

Retrieves the human-readable company name associated with a specific
FlixPatrol company ID.

## Details

This function hits the '/companies/:id' endpoint. It is specifically designed
to reverse a lookup where you have the ID (e.g., from a data table) and
need the display name (e.g., "Netflix").

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
get_company_name("cmp_IA6TdMqwf6kuyQvxo9bJ4nKX")
# [1] "Netflix"

## End(Not run)
```
